tools.name: weekly_meal_planner
tools.description: Generate a balanced weekly meal plan based on available recipes and ingredients with dietary preferences
examples: Generate weekly plan with high-protein options
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown files containing the weekly meal plan with recipe details, categories, ingredients and preparation times

tools.name: ingredient_search
tools.description: Search for recipes containing specific ingredients or find a recipe by ID
examples: Find recipes with 'carne de vaca' or 'frango'
tools.output_description: JSON list of matching recipes with names, IDs, source paths, and ingredients

tools.name: get_recipe_ingredients
tools.description: Get detailed ingredient information for a specific recipe
examples: What are the ingredients for Salsa Verde Chicken?
tools.output_description: Detailed list of ingredients with amounts and units for a specific recipe

tools.name: generate_shopping_list
tools.description: Create shopping lists by parsing recipe files and subtracting existing inventory items
examples: Create grocery list with inventory subtraction
Shopping list for Turkey Chili and Salsa Verde Chicken
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown shopping list with items organized by category, accounting for existing inventory

tools.name: generate_recipe_index
tools.description: Generate a categorized index of all recipes for easy navigation
examples: List all recipes with their source paths
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown files containing a categorized index of all recipes

tools.name: validate_recipe_structure
tools.description: Validate recipe markdown structure against defined schema
examples: Verify all recipes follow standard structure
tools.output_description: JSON validation report and human-readable summary of validation results

tools.name: nutrition_analytics
tools.description: Perform nutritional analysis on recipes or ingredient combinations
examples: Calculate nutritional values for selected recipes
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown analytics showing nutritional information, dietary categories, and preparation statistics

tools.name: batch_preparation_scheduler
tools.description: Calculate optimal batch cooking schedule based on freezer capacity and recipe requirements
examples: Plan preparation time with freezer capacity constraints
Optimize cooking schedule for large prep session
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown schedule with optimal batch preparation times and freezer usage recommendations

tools.name: ingredient_substitution_finder
tools.description: Find suitable ingredient substitutions based on similar ingredients and recipes
examples: What can I use instead of tofu?
tools.output_description: JSON list of recommended substitutions with rationale and recipes that contain substituted ingredients

tools.name: shopping_list_optimizer
tools.description: Optimize shopping lists by grouping ingredients by store aisles
examples: Optimize shopping list by store aisle
Organize ingredients by grocery store section
Create efficient shopping plan with aisle grouping
tools.output_description: JSON and markdown files containing optimized shopping lists organized by store aisles
